# objects

**Instance Property**

This object’s array of child objects.

## Declaration

```swift
var objects: [MDLObject] { get }
```

## Working with Child Objects

- **add(_:)**: Adds the specified object as a child of this object.
- **remove(_:)**: Removes the specified object from this object’s array of children.

items.description: Adds the specified object as a child of this object.
items.name: add(_:)

items.description: Removes the specified object from this object’s array of children.
items.name: remove(_:)
